hotel_name: Khách sạn Thành Vinh (KHÁCH SẠN THÀNH VINH)

reviews.title: Worst place to stay
reviews.text: The entrance is super sketchy, no lights around. The room is equipped with A/C but barely produce any cool air.

reviews.title: It was pleasant but not for the traveling person that is outgoing. If your looking for a place just
reviews.positives: The room was clean. It was an okay place for a short stay
reviews.negatives: Too far from anything. You had to get a taxi or order online to get food or anything you needed. Nothing there but hotel. Was a restaurant but been closed a long time.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Not easy  to find this hotel and too far from the ho chi minh city

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Phòng nghỉ rộng rãi - sạch sẽ - phục vụ nhiệt tình .

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text:
Not clean and room.not serviced for the week.
Fittings in bathroom falling apart.
Furniture barely holding together.

reviews.title: Not a good value
reviews.text:
Very unpleasant stay. It might have been nice when it first opened but the hotel is not a good value for the money. I pre-paid for a "VIP" room, non-smoking and was given a smoked in room. So the receptionist gave me another room that was very dirty. The shower had no curtain and people can see you naked 🙈 I had to put a towel up. The lobby floor and elevator was dirty. Probably due to a dirt road leading to the hotel. The second rooms door was difficult to open. I cannot recommend this hotel and would advise others to stay somewhere else. The owner has let this place go. 

Rooms:
 The rooms and hotel have such potential but there are some big problems:
1. Floor very dirty, causing my feet to get black. The floor hasn't been mopped in awhile. I stayed in the VIP room and feel I paid too much.
2. Toliet seat cover was extremely dirty with black marked that I had to clean myself (see photo).
3. No toliet paper and barely any tissue. I had to use my own tp.
4. The TV was broken and I couldn't use it the whole time. 
5. Lamp was broken.
6. Hair everywhere in the room.

reviews.title: The TV in the room accepts nothing but young people.
reviews.text: The handle doesn't come off and the water in the toilet doesn't stop. I can't watch broadcasts on TV. YouTube can only use the alphabet, so you can't watch anything in any other language.

reviews.title: Convenient location for Cu Chi Tunnels
reviews.text: Convenient location for independent travellers to visit the Cu Chi Tunnels. I am a Solo Motorcyclist.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text:
The first time I didn't pay in advance for the room, it was very good except for a broken wardrobe door and the TV was small, but it was a VIP room for 350k. The first time I lost my hat and when I asked the staff, they said they didn't know. 
Next time I paid in advance for another VIP room, but it didn't have a bathtub, the wardrobe door was broken, the air conditioning was broken, and although the TV was big, it turned out it didn't work either, priced at 250k.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: If you're looking for something cheap, you can come; if you're looking for cleanliness, I wouldn't recommend it.
reviews.room_type: Superior Twin Room for 2 People - Non-Smoking

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: The room is not equipped with a wardrobe - probably because I booked a small room, there are no cleaning staff, and towels are not changed daily. It's okay to stay for a while.

reviews.text: The hotel is decent for the price. However, the access road to the hotel is a dirt road, a bit hidden and a bit difficult to navigate.

reviews.title: Some issues
reviews.text: There is no hair dryer, the toilet seat is slightly yellow, and the access road to the hotel is difficult to navigate.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: The clean and beautiful room, polite reception, but no one answers the desk phone and hotline for asking the wifi password, and the TV cannot be turned on.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: The dirty blanket has blood on it, the wifi is weak and unusable, but the rest of the room is clean and smells good. It would be great to keep bottled water in the refrigerator.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Fully equipped, affordable price, but the room with a bathtub is at a higher price, so I'm a bit disappointed.

reviews.title: Nice people
reviews.text: Friendly approach

reviews.title: She
reviews.text: A cool and quiet space.

reviews.title: It's good here, better than others
reviews.text:
I stayed in a lot of different accommodations and can safely say that it's worth the money. It's silence and you can rest. The facility are working fine. The AC needs a deep clean. I'm not talking about the filter, they are fine I checked but the internal ribs. In the shower is a misisng holder for the bidet as well as shower head piece broke off and wasn't replaced. The light is a bit weak in the room an bathroom nut that's bearable. A fan is a nice addition, fridge working. What I really liked was the ability to open the windows to get fresh air in. Really nice. 
All in all I'd say it's a solid 4.5/5 for Chu Chi.
reviews.response: Thank you for your experience at our hotel.Thank you very much

reviews.title: Clean, beautiful, fragrant VIP room at a low price.
reviews.text: The VIP room is clean, beautiful, and fragrant at a cheap price, with a nice toilet, TV for watching YouTube, fridge, vanity table, and effective fan. It lacks a few items like a hairdryer, kettle, and the remote control often malfunctions, and occasionally there are no paper towels. The location is in the town, close to many restaurants and entertainment services. There is ample parking space for cars, but the entrance is hidden and dark.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The dirty blanket, I asked the staff to change it immediately. Free drinks too. The staff is enthusiastic. Fixing to keep the blanket clean is okay.

reviews.title: Ok
reviews.text: Cute staff

reviews.title: Nice quiet place
reviews.text: The facility is surprisingly good for what it is. The staff are super friendly and helpful as many Cu Chi people you might encounter. Overall, very nice hotel for the price.

reviews.title: A great deal!
reviews.text: This hotel is a great value. The rooms are clean and comfortable.

reviews.title: Clean, beautiful, fragrant VIP room at a low price.
reviews.text: The VIP room is clean, beautiful, and fragrant at a low price, with a nice bathroom, a TV for watching YouTube, and a decent refrigerator and vanity. It lacks a few items like a hair dryer and kettle. The remote control often malfunctions and sometimes there are no paper towels. The location is in a town with many restaurants and entertainment services, but the entrance is hidden and dark.

reviews.title: Hotel services
reviews.text: The hotel is clean, and the receptionist is enthusiastic. The prices are excellent.

reviews.title: Okay, within budget.
reviews.text: The couple had the chance to attend a wedding and stayed here. They found the price reasonable and the room clean.

reviews.title: Spacious, beautiful, and well-equipped room.
reviews.text: Everything is great, the cleaning staff smiles every time they see me, they come right away when needed, very attentive, there are security staff and couples available, in general it's a 9.5 out of 10, plus an additional 0.5 for the cheap overnight rate, making it a perfect 10.
reviews.room_type: Superior Twin Room for 2 People - Non-Smoking

reviews.title: The hotel is okay.
reviews.text: Clean, will continue to support.

reviews.title: Work
reviews.text: The hotel is clean, the staff are polite and courteous, everything is very good... generally nothing to complain about.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The service is very good, the staff are enthusiastic and charming.

reviews.title: The hotel is very good.
reviews.text: The surrounding scenery is spacious, the hot water is fine, the room cleaning service is very clean, transportation is convenient. The hotel staff is enthusiastic, and the prices are reasonable. There is nothing to complain about, so you should give it a try.

reviews.title: My stomach aches.
reviews.text: Every time I go to CC, I stay at this hotel because the staff is enthusiastic and friendly with guests. The special thing is that it is very private.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Hotel is okay. Staff is okay. Room is clean.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: I like this hotel. The VIP room I stayed in this time has four baths. I enjoy soaking in warm water there. The room is clean, and if I have a chance to work in Cu Chi, I will support this hotel again. See you.

reviews.title: 差评🤬不卫生🤬地点差
reviews.text:
预定了6天5夜的房间 都不想待下去 直接退房走人🤬地点太偏僻了

不卫生🤬我预定房间是1张queen size 和 单人床的房间，去到那里货不对版🤬🤬而且房间不卫生😖床头有虫，厕所也有虫😖最离谱的是浴室🛀花洒🚿有蜜蜂窝（太不能接受了）
